attributes.description: Partition replication status: under-replicated partitions, replicas vs in-sync replicas. Critical for durability and failover readiness.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_replicas = SUM(kafka.partition.replicas), total_in_sync = SUM(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_replicas = SUM(kafka.partition.replicas), total_in_sync = SUM(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_replicas = SUM(kafka.partition.replicas), total_in_sync = SUM(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL under = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL under = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL under = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attributes.topic
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL under = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attributes.topic
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), replicas_in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL under = replicas - replicas_in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| SORT under DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), replicas_in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL under = replicas - replicas_in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| SORT under DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), replicas_in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL under = replicas - replicas_in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| SORT under DESC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.content:
## [Kafka OTel] Replication Health

Replication fidelity and ISR status:
- Under-replicated partitions (replicas > replicas_in_sync)
- Partitions by replication factor
- Replicas vs in-sync over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL under = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL under = replicas - in_sync
| WHERE under > 0
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| WHERE replicas == in_sync
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas), in_sync = MAX(kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| WHERE replicas == in_sync
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_rf = COUNT_DISTINCT(kafka.partition.replicas)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_rf = COUNT_DISTINCT(kafka.partition.replicas)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.replicas IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_rf = COUNT_DISTINCT(kafka.partition.replicas)
